name: Harmony Dev
postCreateCommand: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && (cd frontend && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium) && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code @openai/codex && ([ -x ~/dotfiles/install.sh ] && bash ~/dotfiles/install.sh || true)
postStartCommand: if [ -f ~/.claude/.claude.json ] && [ ! -L ~/.claude.json ]; then rm -f ~/.claude.json; ln -s ~/.claude/.claude.json ~/.claude.json; elif [ -f ~/.claude.json ] && [ ! -L ~/.claude.json ]; then mv ~/.claude.json ~/.claude/.claude.json && ln -s ~/.claude/.claude.json ~/.claude.json; fi
